title: Filter
abstract: A fibreglass pre-filter (1) in the form of a secondary or supplementary filter cover (2) mounted on a cylindrical primary air intake filter (3) of a vehicle powered by an internal combustion engine made up of a double layer (6) of the filter cover (2) to protect the air intake filter (3) and improve the life of the air intake filter (3).
claims:
Claims Claims 1. An air intake filter for a combustion engine comprising: a primary filter for filtration of particulate contaminants and a pre-filter cover on the primary filter wherein the pre-filter comprises a fibreglass pre-filter selectable in accordance with the combustion engine to optimise engine performance. 2. An air intake filter for a combustion engine as claimed in Claim 1 wherein the fibreglass pre-filter comprises a fibreglass tissue or membrane. 3. An air intake filter for a combustion engine as claimed in Claim 2 wherein the fibreglass tissue or membrane comprises a woven fibreglass tissue or membrane. 4. An air intake filter for a combustion engine as claimed in Claim 3 wherein the fibreglass tissue or membrane is selectable in accordance with the weave of the tissue or membrane. 5. An air intake filter for a combustion engine as claimed in any of Claims 2 to 4 wherein the fibreglass tissue has a grade from about 400 to about 800g/m 2 . 6. An air intake filter for a combustion engine as claimed in any of Claims 2 to 5 wherein the fibreglass tissue has a grade from about 500 to about 700g/m 2 . 7. An air intake filter for a combustion engine as claimed in any of Claims 2 to 6 wherein the fibreglass tissue has a grade from about 550 to about 650g/m 2 . 8. An air intake filter for a combustion engine as claimed in any of Claims 2 to 7 wherein the fibreglass tissue has a grade of about 600g/m 2 . 9. An air intake filter for a combustion engine as claimed in any of Claims 3 to 8 wherein the woven fibreglass tissue comprises a woven fibreglass fabric double layer. 10. An air intake filter for a combustion engine as claimed in any of Claims 2 to 9 wherein the fibreglass tissue or membrane has a nominal thickness of about 90 microns. 11. An air intake filter for a combustion engine as claimed in any of Claims 1 to 10 wherein the fibreglass pre-filter is selectable from the group consisting of Product Code 100F65E available from Beiyang Building Material Company Limited adapted for marine and heavy duty dust/pollen/harsh combustion engine applications, Product Code 102F65E available from Beiyang Building Material Company Limited for road vehicle combustion engine applications and Product Code 103F65E available from Beiyang Building Material Company Limited for industrial combustion engine applications. 12. An air intake filter for a combustion engine as claimed in any of Claims 2 to 11 wherein the fibreglass tissue or membrane is colour coded in accordance with the combustion engine. 13. A pre-filter cover for use with a primary air intake filter for a combustion engine wherein the pre-filter comprises a fibreglass pre-filter selectable in accordance with the combustion engine to optimise engine performance. 14. A pre-filter cover as claimed in Claim 13 wherein the fibreglass pre-filter comprises a fibreglass tissue or membrane. 15. A pre-filter cover as claimed in Claim 14 wherein the fibreglass tissue or membrane comprises a woven fibreglass tissue or membrane. 16. A pre-filter cover as claimed in Claim 14 or Claim 15 wherein the fibreglass tissue or membrane is selectable in accordance with the weave of the tissue or membrane. 17. A pre-filter cover as claimed in any of Claims 14 to 16 wherein the fibreglass tissue has a grade from about 400 to about 800g/m 2 . 18. A pre-filter cover as claimed in any of Claims 14 to 17 wherein the fibreglass tissue has a grade from about 500 to about 700g/m 2 . 19. A pre-filter cover as claimed in any of Claims 14 to 18 wherein the fibreglass tissue has a grade from about 550 to about 650g/m 2 . 20. A pre-filter cover as claimed in any of Claims 14 to 19 wherein the fibreglass tissue has a grade of about 600g/m 2 . 21. A pre-filter cover as claimed in any of Claims 15 to 20 wherein the woven fibreglass tissue comprises a woven fibreglass fabric double layer. 22. A pre-filter cover as claimed in any of Claims 14 to 21 wherein the fibreglass tissue or membrane has a nominal thickness of about 90 microns. 23. A pre-filter cover as claimed in any of Claims 13 to 22 wherein the fibreglass pre-filter is selectable from the group consisting of Product Code 100F65E available from Beiyang Building Material Company Limited adapted for marine and heavy duty dust/pollen/harsh combustion engine applications, Product Code 102F65E available from Beiyang Building Material Company Limited for road vehicle combustion engine applications and Product Code 103F65E available from Beiyang Building Material Company Limited for industrial combustion engine applications. 24. A pre-filter cover as claimed in any of Claims 13 to 23 wherein the fibreglass tissue or membrane is colour coded in accordance with the combustion engine. 25. A method for improving the performance of a primary air filter for a combustion engine comprising selecting a fibreglass pre-filter cover in accordance with the combustion engine and attaching the pre-filter to the primary filter to cover the primary filter and optimise engine performance. 26. A method for improving the performance of a primary air filter for a combustion engine as claimed in Claim 25 wherein the pre- filter is attached to the outer surface of the primary filter. 27. A method for improving the performance of a primary air filter for a combustion engine as claimed in Claim 26 wherein the pre-filter is attached to the outer surface of the primary filter and covers the primary filter. 28. A method for improving the performance of a primary air filter for a combustion engine as claimed in any of Claims 25 to 27 wherein the fibreglass pre- filter comprises a fibreglass tissue or membrane. 29. A method for improving the performance of a primary air filter for a combustion engine as claimed in Claim 28 wherein the fibreglass tissue or membrane comprises a woven fibreglass tissue or membrane. 30. A method for improving the performance of a primary air filter for a combustion engine as claimed in Claim 29 wherein the fibreglass tissue or membrane is selectable in accordance with the weave of the tissue or membrane. 31. A method for improving the performance of a primary air filter for a combustion engine as claimed in any of Claims 28 to 30 wherein the fibreglass tissue has a grade from about 400 to about 800g/m 2 . 32. A method for improving the performance of a primary air filter for a combustion engine as claimed in any of Claims 28 to 31 wherein the fibreglass tissue has a grade from about 500 to about 700g/m 2 . 33. A method for improving the performance of a primary air filter for a combustion engine as claimed in any of Claims 28 to 32 wherein the fibreglass tissue has a grade from about 550 to about 650g/m 2 . 34. A method for improving the performance of a primary air filter for a combustion engine as claimed in any of Claims 28 to 33 wherein the fibreglass tissue fibreglass has a grade of about 600g/m 2 . 35. A method for improving the performance of a primary air filter for a combustion engine as claimed in any of Claims 29 to 34 wherein the woven fibreglass tissue comprises a woven fibreglass fabric double layer. 36. A method for improving the performance of a primary air filter for a combustion engine as claimed in any of Claims 28 to 35 wherein the fibreglass tissue or membrane has a nominal thickness of about 90 microns. 37. A method for improving the performance of a primary air filter for a combustion engine as claimed in any of Claims 25 to 37 wherein the fibreglass pre- filter is selectable from the group consisting of Product Code 100F65E available from Beiyang Building Material Company Limited adapted for marine and heavy duty dust/pollen/harsh combustion engine applications, Product Code 102F65E available 

 from Beiyang Building Material Company Limited for road vehicle combustion engine applications and Product Code 103F65E available from Beiyang Building Material Company Limited for industrial combustion engine applications. 38. A method for improving the performance of a primary air filter for a combustion engine as claimed in any of Claims 25 to 37 wherein the fibreglass tissue or membrane is colour coded in accordance with the combustion engine. 39. A method for reducing engine emissions and improving combustion engine performance comprising selecting a fibreglass pre-filter cover in accordance with the combustion engine and attaching the pre-filter to the primary filter to cover the primary filter and reduce emissions and optimise engine performance. 40. A method for reducing engine emissions and improving combustion engine performance as claimed in Claim 39 wherein the pre-filter is attached to the outer surface of the primary filter. 41. A method for reducing engine emissions and improving combustion engine performance as claimed in Claim 40 wherein the pre-filter is attached to the outer surface of the primary filter and covers the primary filter. 42. A method for reducing engine emissions and improving combustion engine performance as claimed in any of Claims 39 to 41 wherein the fibreglass pre-filter comprises a fibreglass tissue or membrane. 43. A method for reducing engine emissions and improving combustion engine performance as claimed in Claim 42 wherein the fibreglass tissue or membrane comprises a woven fibreglass tissue or membrane. 44. A method for reducing engine emissions and improving combustion engine performance as claimed in Claim 42 or Claim 43 wherein the fibreglass tissue or membrane is selectable in accordance with the weave of the tissue or membrane. 45. A method for reducing engine emissions and improving combustion engine performance as claimed in any of Claims 42 to 44 wherein the fibreglass tissue has a grade from about 400 to about 800g/m 2 . 46. A method for reducing engine emissions and improving combustion engine performance as claimed in any of Claims 42 to 45 wherein the fibreglass tissue has a grade from about 500 to about 700g/m 2 . 47. A method for reducing engine emissions and improving combustion engine performance as claimed in any of Claims 42 to 46 wherein the fibreglass tissue has a grade from about 550 to about 650g/m 2 . 48. A method for reducing engine emissions and improving combustion engine performance as claimed in any of Claims 42 to 47 wherein the fibreglass tissue has a grade of about 600g/m 2 . 49. A method for reducing engine emissions and improving combustion engine performance as claimed in any of Claims 43 to 48 wherein the woven fibreglass fabric layer comprises a woven fibreglass fabric double layer. 50. A method for reducing engine emissions and improving combustion engine performance as claimed in any of Claims 42 to 49 wherein the fibreglass tissue or membrane has a nominal thickness of about 90 microns. 51. A method for reducing engine emissions and improving combustion engine performance as claimed in any of Claims 39 to 50 wherein the fibreglass pre-filter is selectable from the group consisting of Product Code 100F65E available from Beiyang Building Material Company Limited adapted for marine and heavy duty dust/pollen/harsh combustion engine applications, Product Code 102F65E available from Beiyang Building Material Company Limited for road vehicle combustion engine applications and Product Code 103F65E available from Beiyang Building Material Company Limited for industrial combustion engine applications. 52. A method for reducing engine emissions and improving combustion engine performance as claimed in any of Claims 42 to 51 wherein the fibreglass tissue or membrane is colour coded in accordance with the combustion engine.
